What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short brown hair wearing a black v-neck t-shirt stands behind a bar counter. Dark wooden shelves filled with various liquor bottles stand in the background. A large square glass bottle of 1800 tequila sits on the counter near a wooden cutting board with sliced green limes. The man holds a clear glass tumbler and squeezes a lime wedge into it.

Describe the sequence of actions the bartender performs with the glass and ingredients from the beginning of the clip until the end.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the man holds a clear glass tumbler with both hands; at 8s, he holds a large bottle of 1800 tequila with his right hand; at 16s, he uses his right hand to pick up a lime wedge from the cutting board; at 18s, he is squeezing a lime wedge into a glass held in his left hand.

What does the man do with the green lime squeezer he is holding?
canonical_answer: He squeezes lime juice into a glass measuring cup.
